gallerySubtitle: Discover the heroes of the Karbala epic
ziyaratSubtitle: Spiritual connection with the divine guides
ziyaratAshuraDesc: Ziyarat Ashura is a highly respected salutation to Imam Hussain (AS) and the martyrs of Karbala.
ziyaratWarithDesc: Ziyarat Warith connects Imam Hussain (AS) to the divine mission of all Prophets.
copyright: All rights reserved for Karbala Pro.

pins.imamHussainCampDesc: The camp of Imam Hussain and his companions, located behind the battlefield.
pins.abbasWaterDesc: The river surrounded by the enemy, where Al-Abbas (AS) went to fetch water.
pins.umarSaadCampDesc: The encampment of the enemy's thirty-thousand-strong army.
pins.habibPositionDesc: Commander of the left wing of Imam Hussain's army on the day of Ashura.
pins.womenTentsDesc: The sanctuary of the women, children, and the holy family of Imam Hussain (AS).
pins.tallZaynabiyyaDesc: The elevated mound where Lady Zaynab (SA) overlooked the battlefield and witnessed the tragedy.
pins.maqtalDesc: The exact pit where the Master of Martyrs (AS) fell and was martyred.
pins.zuhayrPositionDesc: Commander of the right wing of Imam Hussain's army, known for his bravery.
pins.aliAkbarMartyrdomDesc: The location where the first martyr of Bani Hashim fell after a fierce battle.
pins.qasimMartyrdomDesc: Where the young nephew of the Imam fought heroically and was struck down.
pins.alqamahRiverDesc: A branch of the Euphrates blocked by the enemy, where Abbas (AS) sacrificed his arms.
